title: Acrylic Display Case with USB RGB LED Lighting Base, App & Key Controlled, Crystal-Clear Display Box with Ball Stand for Soccer, Volleyball & Football, 25x25x25cm
features: Premium Clarity: Crafted from high-quality, crystal-clear acrylic, our display case provides an unobstructed view, ensuring your collectibles are showcased in their full glory.
Hassle-Free Setup: Effortlessly assemble with precision-cut panels and easy-to-follow instructions. No need for extra tools, just a sleek, professional display in minutes.

Dynamic RGB Lighting: USB-powered RGB LED lights bring your display to life with a spectrum of colours and effects. Choose from 16 million colours and 213 dynamic modes to create the perfect ambiance.
Smart Control Options: Seamlessly switch between the included key controller and the mobile app for full control of your lighting. Features include music sync, mic modes, scheduling, and more.
Versatile Display Solution: Perfect for a variety of collectibles including action figures, models, sports memorabilia, trophies, helmets, and more. Available in multiple sizes to fit your needs.
description: Product Description Light Up Acrylic Display Case with Controller APP Music Sync Vibrant RGB Lighting: Built-in RGB LED strip lights powered by 5V USB allow you to create a mesmerizing display with multiple colors and dynamic modes. Comprehensive Control: Manage your LED lights using the included controller or the app. Explore features like 16 million colors, 213 dynamic modes, music sync, mic modes, and scheduling.
